news.t: AllianzIM to Transfer Exchange Listings and Fund Name Changes
AllianzIM Launches Two New Buffered ETFs that Hedge the S&P 500 Exposure

overview.description: The AllianzIM U.S. Equity Buffer10 Feb ETF (FEBT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund aims for specific buffered losses and capped gains on the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust over a specific holdings period. The actively managed fund holds options and collateral. FEBT was launched on Jan 31, 2023 and is issued by Allianz.
